_comment: ADOPT: one file per service at docs/governance/services/<service-id>.json (Loom 2.0 §7.4, R1–R6). The dates below are deliberately unparseable — this template FAILS the operational-readiness gate until you have actually run the drill and recorded when. Freshness windows (scripts/operational-readiness-check.mjs): BCP/DR 365d, rollback 180d, kill-switch 90d, capacity 365d.

bcp_dr.last_exercised: ADOPT: date of your last DR exercise

rollback.last_drilled: ADOPT: date of your last rollback drill

kill_switch.mechanism: feature flag credit.decisioning.enabled → manual underwriting queue
kill_switch.last_tested: ADOPT: date of your last kill-switch test

capacity.last_run: ADOPT: date of your last stress test

reconciliation: daily limits-vs-ledger reconciliation; breaks page operations
failed_transaction_recovery: idempotent limit commands; replay from audit trail after recovery
complaints_readiness: care scripts + remediation matrix published; complaints tagged to product PRD-017
regulatory_notification_triggers: customer-impacting outage > 2h, or any data incident, per incident runbook
